sections.paragraph:
σφοδρῶς adv. (Hom. et al.; Aelian, NA 14, 26 p. 359, 23; SIG 1169, 57; LXX; Jos., Ant. 13, 292 al.) very much, greatly, violently (s. two prec. entries) σφ. χειμάζεσθαι be violently beaten by a storm Ac 27:18 (cp. Jos., Ant. 14, 377 χειμῶνι σφοδρῷ περιπεσών).

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Aelian Aelian , II a.d.—List 5

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

prec. prec. = preceding

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 980
